title: Column Headers
text: Column Headers This property determines whether column headers are displayed. True (default) or False . This property is static and cannot be set in ProcScript. Applies to egrid (Grid) Related Links egrid (Grid) The egrid widget displays data in a tabular format, in which the rows are occurrences of an entity and the columns are fields. It is an entity-level widget that is only applicable to form components. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
